subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh in praise of thy Lord! Verily hath the Divine Word been embodied in a luminous form and hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الناطقه بثناء ربها ان الکلمه الالهیه قد تجسمت علی هیکل نورانی و اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
